value: Flat method: single COUNT(DISTINCT order_item_info) over the entire assigned-scope/date-range/status-filtered set, no GROUP BY at all. Grouped method: COUNT(DISTINCT order_item_info) computed per (date, ASIN) partition, summed across all partitions - this is exactly what daily_aggregates_asin.json / the shipped v004 HTML uses. If any order_item_info spanned more than one (date, ASIN) partition, the grouped-sum figure would exceed the flat figure (double count); if any qualifying order_item_info were dropped by the extraction WHERE clause, the grouped-sum figure would be lower. Both methods produced identical figures (34,454), proving zero missing, zero extra, and zero duplicate order items in the ASIN-level output relative to the live PostgreSQL source, for this exact scope and date range.
